When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock Method}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|de|Azimut|ja|方位角}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō}}||0・5||Kō||Between {{ill|Monkey|de|Affe|ja|申|lt=Monkey|lt_ja=申|lt_de=Monkey}} and {{ill|Rooster|de|Hahn|ja|酉|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South}} slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|12=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|12=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|12=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|12=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|12=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|12=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|12=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|12=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|12=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|12=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=draft}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock Method|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|de|Azimut|ja|方位角|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=draft}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=draft}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|12=draft}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|12=draft}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|12=draft}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=draft}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|12=draft}}||0・5||Kō||Between {{ill|Monkey|de|Affe|ja|申|lt=Monkey|lt_ja=申|lt_de=Monkey|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rooster|de|Hahn|ja|酉|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster|12=draft}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South|12=draft}} slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|12=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|12=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|12=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|12=draft}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft}}). Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|12=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|12=draft}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|12=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|12=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|12=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|12=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|12=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|12=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|12=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|12=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|12=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|12=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|12=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=draft}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock Method|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|de|Azimut|ja|方位角|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=draft}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=draft}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|12=draft}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|12=draft}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|12=draft}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=draft}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|12=draft}}||0・5||Kō||Between {{ill|Monkey|de|Affe|ja|申|lt=Monkey|lt_ja=申|lt_de=Monkey|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rooster|de|Hahn|ja|酉|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster|12=draft}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South|12=draft}} slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|12=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|12=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|12=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|12=draft}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=draft|12=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|12=draft|12=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft|12=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=draft|12=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|12=draft|12=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|12=draft|12=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|12=draft|12=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=draft|12=draft}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock Method|12=draft|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|de|Azimut|ja|方位角|12=draft|12=draft}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=draft|12=draft}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=draft|12=draft}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|12=draft|12=draft}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|12=draft|12=draft}}||0・5||Kō||Between {{ill|Monkey|de|Affe|ja|申|lt=Monkey|lt_ja=申|lt_de=Monkey|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rooster|de|Hahn|ja|酉|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster|12=draft|12=draft}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=draft|12=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft|12=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=draft|12=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=draft|12=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft|12=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|12=draft|12=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|12=draft|12=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|12=draft|12=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=draft|12=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|12=draft|12=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft|12=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=draft|12=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|12=draft|12=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|12=draft|12=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|12=draft|12=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? {{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=draft|12=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft|12=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=draft|12=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=draft|12=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=draft|12=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=draft|12=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=draft|12=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|12=draft|12=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|12=draft|12=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|12=draft|12=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|12=draft|12=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=draft|12=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=draft|12=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=draft|12=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||0・5||Kō||Between slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|qq=draft|qq=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

revision.comment: 95 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:歳徳神 up to rev 103714853
revision.text:
[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|歳徳神
（『安部晴明簠簋内傳圖解』）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|恵方の方位]] '''歳徳神'''（としとくじん、とんどさん）は、[[陰陽道]]で、その[[年]]の福徳を司る神である。'''年徳'''、'''[[年神|歳神]]'''、'''正月さま'''などとも言う。 ほとんどの[[暦]]では、最初の方のページに王妃のような姿の美しい姫神の歳徳神を記載している。歳徳神の由来には諸説あり、『[[簠簋内伝]]』では、[[牛頭天王]]の后・[[八将神]]の母の'''[[頗梨采女]]'''（はりさいじょ）であるとしているが、{{誰範囲|date=2024年10月|これはでたらめであるとの批判}}もある。また、牛頭天王が[[スサノオ|須佐之男尊]]と[[習合]]したことから、その妃の[[クシナダヒメ|櫛稲田姫]]とも同一視される。 == 恵方 == 歳徳神の在する[[方位]]を'''恵方'''（えほう、吉方、兄方）、または'''明の方'''（あきのかた）と言い、その方角に向かって事を行えば、万事に吉とされる『年中行事事典』p.103-104 [[1958年]]（[[昭和]]33年）[[5月23日]]初版発行 [[西角井正慶]]編 東京堂出版。 歳徳神の在する方位（すなわち恵方）は、その年の[[十干]]によって下記のように決まる{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=恵方巻きの方角は？2025年節分はいつ？由来・食べ方のルールを知り開運！|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}。 {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|年!!colspan="6"|恵方 |- !十干!!西暦の一の位!![[二十四山|24方位]]!!十二支!![[クロックポジション|時計法]]!![[方位角]]!![[羅針方位|32方位]]!!16方位 |- |[[甲]]・[[己]]||4・9||甲||[[寅]][[卯]]間||{{0}}2時半||{{0}}75°||[[方位|東微北]]やや北||[[方位|東北東]]やや東 |- |[[乙]]・[[庚]]||0・5||庚||[[申]][[酉]]間||{{0}}8時半||255°||[[方位|西微南]]やや南||[[方位|西南西]]やや西 |- |[[丙]]・[[辛]]
[[戊]]・[[癸]]||1・6
3・8||丙||[[巳]][[午]]間||{{0}}5時半||165°||[[方位|南微東]]やや東||[[方位|南南東]]やや南 |- |[[丁]]・[[壬]]||2・7||壬||[[亥]][[子 (十二支)|子]]間||11時半||345°||[[方位|北微西]]やや西||[[方位|北北西]]やや北 |}かつては、[[初詣]]は自宅から見て恵方の方角の寺社に参る習慣があった（[[恵方詣り]]）。また、[[節分]]の行事として恵方を向いて「[[巻き寿司|太巻き]]の丸かぶり」を行う[[恵方巻]]の風習が関西を中心に行なわれていたが、コンビニエンスストア等の宣伝やキャンペーンで全国に認知されつつある。なお、宣伝やキャンペーンにあたっては24方位ではなく日常的な16方位による簡便な説明が行われることが多い。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} == 関連項目 == *[[節分]] *[[風水]] *[[稚日女尊]] {{DEFAULTSORT:としとくしん}} [[Category:道教の神]] [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:日本の民間信仰]] [[Category:方位]] [[Category:女神]] [[Category:新春の季語]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[歳徳神]] to [[Toshitoku-shin]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|歳徳神
（『安部晴明簠簋内傳圖解』）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|恵方の方位]] '''歳徳神'''（としとくじん、とんどさん）は、[[陰陽道]]で、その[[年]]の福徳を司る神である。'''年徳'''、'''[[年神|歳神]]'''、'''正月さま'''などとも言う。 ほとんどの[[暦]]では、最初の方のページに王妃のような姿の美しい姫神の歳徳神を記載している。歳徳神の由来には諸説あり、『[[簠簋内伝]]』では、[[牛頭天王]]の后・[[八将神]]の母の'''[[頗梨采女]]'''（はりさいじょ）であるとしているが、{{誰範囲|date=2024年10月|これはでたらめであるとの批判}}もある。また、牛頭天王が[[スサノオ|須佐之男尊]]と[[習合]]したことから、その妃の[[クシナダヒメ|櫛稲田姫]]とも同一視される。 == 恵方 == 歳徳神の在する[[方位]]を'''恵方'''（えほう、吉方、兄方）、または'''明の方'''（あきのかた）と言い、その方角に向かって事を行えば、万事に吉とされる『年中行事事典』p.103-104 [[1958年]]（[[昭和]]33年）[[5月23日]]初版発行 [[西角井正慶]]編 東京堂出版。 歳徳神の在する方位（すなわち恵方）は、その年の[[十干]]によって下記のように決まる{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=恵方巻きの方角は？2025年節分はいつ？由来・食べ方のルールを知り開運！|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}。 {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|年!!colspan="6"|恵方 |- !十干!!西暦の一の位!![[二十四山|24方位]]!!十二支!![[クロックポジション|時計法]]!![[方位角]]!![[羅針方位|32方位]]!!16方位 |- |[[甲]]・[[己]]||4・9||甲||[[寅]][[卯]]間||{{0}}2時半||{{0}}75°||[[方位|東微北]]やや北||[[方位|東北東]]やや東 |- |[[乙]]・[[庚]]||0・5||庚||[[申]][[酉]]間||{{0}}8時半||255°||[[方位|西微南]]やや南||[[方位|西南西]]やや西 |- |[[丙]]・[[辛]]
[[戊]]・[[癸]]||1・6
3・8||丙||[[巳]][[午]]間||{{0}}5時半||165°||[[方位|南微東]]やや東||[[方位|南南東]]やや南 |- |[[丁]]・[[壬]]||2・7||壬||[[亥]][[子 (十二支)|子]]間||11時半||345°||[[方位|北微西]]やや西||[[方位|北北西]]やや北 |}かつては、[[初詣]]は自宅から見て恵方の方角の寺社に参る習慣があった（[[恵方詣り]]）。また、[[節分]]の行事として恵方を向いて「[[巻き寿司|太巻き]]の丸かぶり」を行う[[恵方巻]]の風習が関西を中心に行なわれていたが、コンビニエンスストア等の宣伝やキャンペーンで全国に認知されつつある。なお、宣伝やキャンペーンにあたっては24方位ではなく日常的な16方位による簡便な説明が行われることが多い。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} == 関連項目 == *[[節分]] *[[風水]] *[[稚日女尊]] {{DEFAULTSORT:としとくしん}} [[Category:道教の神]] [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:日本の民間信仰]] [[Category:方位]] [[Category:女神]] [[Category:新春の季語]]

[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" {{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||1・6

Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|qq=draft|qq=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|de|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|de|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Position|de|Uhrzeigersinn|ja|クロックポジション|lt=Clock Method|lt_ja=時計法|lt_de=Clock Method|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|de|Azimut|ja|方位角|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|qq=draft|qq=draft}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||0・5||Kō||Between {{ill|Monkey|de|Affe|ja|申|lt=Monkey|lt_ja=申|lt_de=Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Rooster|de|Hahn|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|2=ja|3=酉|4=fr|5=Coq (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Haan (astrologie)|lt=Rooster (酉)|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly south||{{ill|West-Southwest|de|West-Southwest|ja|方位|lt=西南西|lt_ja=西南西|lt_de=West-Southwest|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|qq=draft|qq=draft}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|qq=draft|qq=draft}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|qq=draft|qq=draft}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help}} == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōdō|qq=}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Year Deity|qq=}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/calendar|qq=}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|qq=}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox-Headed Heavenly King|qq=}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|qq=}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|de|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Syncretism|qq=}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/orientation|qq=}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1958|qq=}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Showa|qq=}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 23|qq=}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|qq=}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heavenly Stems|qq=}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" (zodiac)|qq=}}||{{0}}8:30||255°||{{ill|West by South|de|West by South|ja|方位|lt=西微南|lt_ja=西微南|lt_de=West by South|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/West by South|qq=}} slightly |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin|qq=}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|qq=}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|qq=}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|qq=}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/South by East|qq=}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/South-Southeast|qq=}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|qq=}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boar|qq=}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rat|qq=}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/North by West|qq=}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/North-Northwest|qq=}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatsumode|qq=}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|qq=}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|qq=}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|qq=}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setsubun|qq=}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Feng Shui|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakahi-no-Hime|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōdō|qq=}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Year Deity|qq=}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/calendar|qq=}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|qq=}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox-Headed Heavenly King|qq=}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|qq=}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|de|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Syncretism|qq=}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/orientation|qq=}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1958|qq=}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Showa|qq=}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 23|qq=}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|qq=}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heavenly Stems|qq=}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・{{ill|Shin|de|Shin|ja|辛|lt=辛|lt_ja=辛|lt_de=Shin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin|qq=}}
{{ill|Bo|de|Bo|ja|戊|lt=戊|lt_ja=戊|lt_de=Bo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|qq=}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|qq=}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|qq=}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|South by East|de|Süd bei Ost|ja|方位|lt=南微東|lt_ja=南微東|lt_de=South by East|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/South by East|qq=}} slightly east||{{ill|South-Southeast|de|Süd-Südost|ja|方位|lt=南南東|lt_ja=南南東|lt_de=South-Southeast|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/South-Southeast|qq=}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・{{ill|Jin|de|Jin|ja|壬|lt=壬|lt_ja=壬|lt_de=Jin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|qq=}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Boar|de|Schwein|ja|亥|lt=Boar|lt_ja=亥|lt_de=Boar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boar|qq=}} and {{ill|Rat|de|Ratte|ja|子|lt=子|lt_ja=子|lt_de=Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rat|qq=}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|North by West|de|Nord bei West|ja|方位|lt=北微西|lt_ja=北微西|lt_de=North by West|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/North by West|qq=}} slightly west||{{ill|North-Northwest|de|Nord-Nordwest|ja|方位|lt=北北西|lt_ja=北北西|lt_de=North-Northwest|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/North-Northwest|qq=}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumode|de|Hatsumode|ja|初詣|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatsumode|qq=}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|qq=}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|qq=}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|qq=}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|de|Setsubun|ja|節分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setsubun|qq=}} * {{ill|Feng Shui|de|Feng Shui|ja|風水|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Feng Shui|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakahi-no-Hime|de|Wakahi-no-Hime|ja|稚日女尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakahi-no-Hime|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Taoist Deities]] [[Category:Onmyōdō Deities]] [[Category:Japanese Folk Beliefs]] [[Category:Orientations]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:New Year's Seasonal Words]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Toshitoku-shin]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]]

revision.text:
[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|de|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōdō|qq=}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|year|de|Jahr|ja|年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/year|qq=}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Year Deity|de|Jahresgott|ja|年神|lt=歳神|lt_ja=歳神|lt_de=Jahresgott|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Year Deity|qq=}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|calendar|de|Kalender|ja|暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/calendar|qq=}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|qq=}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Ox-Headed Heavenly King|de|Ochsenkopf-Himmelskönig|ja|牛頭天王|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox-Headed Heavenly King|qq=}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|qq=}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|de|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|スサノオ|lt=須佐之男尊|lt_ja=須佐之男尊|lt_de=Susanoo|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}} and {{ill|Syncretism|de|Synkretismus|ja|習合|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Syncretism|qq=}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|de|Kushinadahime|ja|クシナダヒメ|lt=櫛稲田姫|lt_ja=櫛稲田姫|lt_de=Kushinadahime|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|qq=}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|orientation|de|Ausrichtung|ja|方位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/orientation|qq=}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|de|1958|ja|1958年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1958|qq=}} ({{ill|Showa|de|Showa|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Showa|qq=}} 33) {{ill|May 23|de|23. Mai|ja|5月23日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 23|qq=}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|qq=}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heavenly Stems|qq=}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Ten Heavenly Stems|de|Zehn Himmelsstämme|ja|十干|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heavenly Stems|qq=}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|qq=}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock Directions|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|qq=}}!!16 Directions |- |{{ill|Kou|de|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|lt=甲|lt_ja=甲|lt_de=Kou|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|qq=}}・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between {{ill|Tiger|de|Tiger|ja|寅|lt=Tiger|lt_ja=寅|lt_de=Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|qq=}} and {{ill|Rabbit|de|Kaninchen|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|lt=Rabbit|lt_ja=卯|lt_de=Kaninchen|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=}}||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||{{ill|East by North|de|Ost bei Nord|ja|方位|lt=東微北|lt_ja=東微北|lt_de=East by North|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/East by North|qq=}} slightly north||{{ill|East-Northeast|de|Ost-Nordost|ja|方位|lt=東北東|lt_ja=東北東|lt_de=East-Northeast|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/East-Northeast|qq=}} slightly east |- (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・{{ill|Kō|de|Kō|ja|庚|lt=庚|lt_ja=庚|lt_de=Kō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō|qq=}}||0・5||Kō||Between chinoise)|6=nl|7=Haan (astrologie)|lt=Rooster (酉)|lt=Rooster|lt_ja=酉|lt_de=Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rooster|13=User:Immanuelle/Rooster
