revision.text:
[[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}}

3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}}

[[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6

Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}}

[[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] who governs the blessings of the [[:en:Year|year]]. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', [[:en:Toshigami|歳神]], and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most [[:en:Calendar|calendar]]s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of [[:en:Gozu Tennō|Ox-Headed Heavenly King]] and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with [[:en:Susanoo-no-Mikoto|須佐之男尊]] and [[:en:Religious syncretism|Syncretism]], he is also identified with his consort, [[:en:Kushinadahime|櫛稲田姫]]. == Ehou == The [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]] in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, [[:en:1958|1958]] ([[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] 33) [[:en:May 23|May 23]] first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- ![[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!![[:en:Clock position|Clock Method]]!![[:en:Azimuth|Azimuth]]!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- |[[:en:Kou|甲]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|lt=己|lt_ja=己|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||4・9||Kou||Between [[:en:Tiger|Tiger]] and [[:en:Rabbit|Rabbit]]||{{0}}2:30||{{0}}75°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東微北]] slightly north||[[:en:Cardinal direction|東北東]] slightly east |- |{{ill|Otsu|de|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|lt=乙|lt_ja=乙|lt_de=Otsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|qq=}}・[[:en:Ko fight|庚]]||0・5||Kō||Between [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] and [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster]]||{{0}}8:30||255°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西微南]] slightly south||[[:en:Cardinal direction|西南西]] slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・[[:en:Shin|辛]]
[[:en:Bo|戊]]・{{ill|Ki|de|Ki|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=癸|lt_ja=癸|lt_de=Ki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|qq=}}||1・6
3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南微東]] slightly east||[[:en:Cardinal direction|南南東]] slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・[[:en:Jin|壬]]||2・7||Jin||Between [[:en:Pig (zodiac)|Boar]] and [[:en:Ratte|子]]||11:30||345°||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北微西]] slightly west||[[:en:Cardinal direction|北北西]] slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ([[:en:Hatsumōde|Hatsumode]]) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * [[:en:Setsubun|Setsubun]] * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng Shui]] * [[:en:Wakahiru-me|Wakahi-no-Hime]] {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

(丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・{{ill|Shin|en|Shin|WD=Q33574|lt=辛}}

3・8||Hei||Between {{ill|Snake|de|Schlange|ja|巳|1=Snake_(zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|lt=Snake|lt_ja=巳|lt_de=Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16676479}} and {{ill|Horse|de|Pferd|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|lt=Horse|lt_ja=午|lt_de=Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683439}}||{{0}}5:30||165°||{{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=南微東}} slightly east||{{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=南南東}} slightly south |- |{{ill|Tei|de|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|lt=丁|lt_ja=丁|lt_de=Tei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|qq=}}・{{ill|Jin|en|Jin|WD=Q29005|lt=壬}}||2・7||Jin||Between {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|WD=Q877261|lt=Boar}} and {{ill|Ratte|en|Ratte|WD=Q2132929|lt=子}}||11:30||345°||{{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=北微西}} slightly west||{{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=北北西}} slightly north |} Previously, it was customary to perform the New Year's visit ({{ill|Hatsumōde|en|Hatsumōde|WD=Q1032381|lt=Hatsumode}}) by going from home to a shrine or temple located in the Ehou direction ({{ill|Ehou-mairi|de|Ehou-Besuch|ja|恵方詣り|lt=Ehou-mairi|lt_ja=恵方詣り|lt_de=Ehou-mairi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-mairi|1=Ehō-mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11492386}}). Additionally, as a Setsubun event, there was a custom—primarily in the Kansai region—of facing Ehou and eating an entire thick sushi roll ({{ill|Sushi Roll|de|Sushi Rolle|ja|巻き寿司|lt=Thick Roll|lt_ja=太巻き|lt_de=Thick Roll|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sushi Roll|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=makizushi|WD=Q5739461}}) in one bite, known as the {{ill|Ehou-maki|de|Ehou-maki|ja|恵方巻|lt=Ehou-maki|lt_ja=恵方巻|lt_de=Ehou-maki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ehou-maki|1=ehōmaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389530}} custom, which is gradually gaining nationwide recognition through promotions and campaigns by convenience stores and others. Note that for such promotions, a simplified explanation based on the common 16 directions is often provided instead of the full 24 directions. == Footnotes == == Related Topics == * {{ill|Setsubun|en|Setsubun|WD=Q746798|lt=Setsubun}} * {{ill|Feng shui|en|Feng shui|WD=Q170537|lt=Feng Shui}} * {{ill|Wakahiru-me|en|Wakahiru-me|WD=Q11596349|lt=Wakahi-no-Hime}} {{translated page|ja|歳徳神|version=103714853|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:歳徳神]] [[de:Toshitoku Gott]] [[ja:%E6%AD%B3%E5%BE%B3%E7%A5%9E]] {{wikidata link|Q11546822}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Directions]] [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Japanese folk religion]] [[Category:Seasonal terms for New Year]] [[Category:Taoist deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] [[ja:歳徳神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11546822]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|150px|'''Toshitoku God'''
（'Abe Seimei's Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation'）]] [[File:Ehou-direction.png|thumb|right|270px|Ehou Direction]] '''Toshitoku God''' (Toshitokujin, Tondosan) is a deity in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}} who governs the blessings of the {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}}. It is also known as '''Nen Toku''', {{ill|Toshigami|en|Toshigami|WD=Q3028663|lt=歳神}}, and '''New Year's Deity'''. In most {{ill|Calendar|en|Calendar|WD=Q12132|lt=calendar}}s, the opening pages include an entry for the beautiful princess deity—resembling a queen—who represents Toshitoku God. There are various theories regarding the origin of Toshitoku God. In ''{{ill|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|de|Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja|簠簋内伝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuugi Naiden Illustrated Explanation|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 三国相伝陰陽輨轄簠簋内伝金烏玉兎集|1=Shinnaiden|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11277704}}'', it is stated that he is the consort of {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|WD=Q11570247|lt=Ox-Headed Heavenly King}} and that his consort is the mother of the {{ill|Eight General Deities|de|Acht Generalgötter|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight General Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}, namely {{ill|Harisaijo|de|Harisaijo|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harisaijo|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1654753}} (Harisaijo), although {{誰範囲|date=October 2024|This has been criticized as nonsense}}. Furthermore, because Ox-Headed Heavenly King syncretized with {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|lt=須佐之男尊}} and {{ill|Religious syncretism|en|Religious syncretism|WD=Q21652002|lt=Syncretism}}, he is also identified with his consort, {{ill|Kushinadahime|en|Kushinadahime|WD=Q505469|lt=櫛稲田姫}}. == Ehou == The {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}} in which Toshitoku God resides is called '''Ehou''' (Ehou, Lucky Direction, or Brother Direction), or '''Akino Kata''' (Akino Kata), and it is believed that if one performs activities facing that direction, all undertakings will be auspicious."Nenchū Gyōji Jiten", pp. 103–104, {{ill|1958|en|1958|WD=Q5253|lt=1958}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Showa}} 33) {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|WD=Q2583|lt=May 23}} first edition published, edited by {{ill|Masataka Nishikado|de|Masataka Nishikado|ja|西角井正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masataka Nishikado|1=Masayoshi Nishitsunoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11629502}}, Tōkyodō Publishing. The orientation (i.e., Ehou) in which Toshitoku God resides is determined by the year's {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} as shown below{{Cite web|url=https://allabout.co.jp/gm/gc/220582/#3|title=What is the Direction of the Ehou-maki? When is Setsubun 2025? Learn the origin, rules of eating, and how to attract good fortune!|accessdate=2025-02-12|publisher=AllAbout}}. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;" !colspan="2"|Year!!colspan="6"|Ehou |- !{{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}!!Last digit of AD year!!{{ill|24 Directions|de|24 Richtungen|ja|二十四山|lt=24 Directions|lt_ja=二十四山|lt_de=24 Richtungen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/24 Directions|1=24 Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371384}}!!12 Zodiac Animals!!{{ill|Clock position|en|Clock position|WD=Q5134807|lt=Clock Method}}!!{{ill|Azimuth|en|Azimuth|WD=Q124274|lt=Azimuth}}!!{{ill|Compass Orientation|de|Kompassrichtung|ja|羅針方位|lt=32 Directions|lt_ja=32方位|lt_de=32 Directions|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Compass Orientation|1=Compass Orientation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17232980}}!!16 Directions |- south||{{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=西南西}} slightly west |- |{{ill|Hei|de|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|lt=丙|lt_ja=丙|lt_de=Hei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|qq=}}・{{ill|Shin|en|Shin|WD=Q33574|lt=辛}}
